- 1/4 cup of water

7. In a small bowl, mix together the white wine, lemon juice, and water.
8. Pour the mixture over the chicken pieces in the baking dish.
9. Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30-40 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
10. Remove the aluminum foil and bake for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the chicken is crispy and browned.
11. Serve hot and enjoy!
